violations.text: A staff member was observed not washing hands prior to putting gloves on. Staff directed to wash hands. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Eggs, cheese, and sausage were observed held at 59-63 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was turned on during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The prep unit is in poor repair. Per PIC, unit "freezes up" during operation. Staff turn off machine during operating hours to defrost. PIC stated work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
